initial_candidates.sql:
SELECT 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM trans t 
   JOIN account a ON t.account_id = a.account_id 
   JOIN district d ON a.district_id = d.district_id 
   WHERE d.A2 IN ('East Bohemia', 'North Bohemia') AND strftime('%Y', t.date) = '1996') -
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM trans t 
   JOIN account a ON t.account_id = a.account_id 
   JOIN district d ON a.district_id = d.district_id 
   WHERE d.A2 IN ('North Bohemia', 'East Bohemia') AND strftime('%Y', t.date) = '1996')

SELECT 
  ABS(
    (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM district WHERE A2 LIKE '%East%') - 
    (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM district WHERE A2 LIKE '%North%')
  ) AS crime_difference
FROM district
LIMIT 1;

SELECT 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) 
   FROM district d 
   JOIN client c ON d.district_id = c.district_id 
   WHERE d.A2 IN ('East Bohemia', 'North Bohemia') 
   GROUP BY d.A2 
   HAVING d.A2 = 'East Bohemia') - 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) 
   FROM district d 
   JOIN client c ON d.district_id = c.district_id 
   WHERE d.A2 IN ('East Bohemia', 'North Bohemia') 
   GROUP BY d.A2 
   HAVING d.A2 = 'North Bohemia') AS crime_difference

SELECT 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) 
   FROM trans t 
   JOIN account a ON t.account_id = a.account_id 
   JOIN district d ON a.district_id = d.district_id 
   WHERE d.A2 = 'East Bohemia' AND strftime('%Y', t.date) = '1996') -
  (SELECT COUNT(*) 
   FROM trans t 
   JOIN account a ON t.account_id = a.account_id 
   JOIN district d ON a.district_id = d.district_id 
   WHERE d.A2 = 'North Bohemia' AND strftime('%Y', t.date) = '1996') AS crime_difference

aggregation.selected_sql:
SELECT 
  ABS(
    (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM district WHERE A2 LIKE '%East%') - 
    (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM district WHERE A2 LIKE '%North%')
  ) AS crime_difference
FROM district
LIMIT 1;

candidates.sql:
SELECT 
  SUM(CASE WHEN d.A2 = 'East Bohemia' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) - 
  SUM(CASE WHEN d.A2 = 'North Bohemia' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS crime_difference
FROM district d
JOIN client c ON d.district_id = c.district_id
WHERE d.A2 IN ('East Bohemia', 'North Bohemia');

SELECT 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM district d JOIN client c ON d.district_id = c.district_id WHERE d.A2 = 'East Bohemia') -
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM district d JOIN client c ON d.district_id = c.district_id WHERE d.A2 = 'North Bohemia') AS crime_difference
